meta.description: Reusable master data for future Nilalang, skills, items, quests, and battles.

affiliations.name: Forest
affiliations.description: Power drawn from ancient trees, vines, wildlife, and living groves.

affiliations.name: Mountain
affiliations.description: Power drawn from cliffs, stone peaks, endurance, and sacred highlands.

affiliations.name: River
affiliations.description: Power drawn from freshwater, currents, rain-fed streams, and healing waters.

affiliations.name: Sea
affiliations.description: Power drawn from oceans, tides, reefs, storms, and maritime mysteries.

affiliations.name: Sky
affiliations.description: Power drawn from wind, clouds, birds, lightning, and open horizons.

affiliations.name: Sacred
affiliations.description: Power drawn from blessing, ritual purity, vows, prayer, and sanctuaries.

affiliations.name: Shadow
affiliations.description: Power drawn from fear, night, secrets, curses, and hidden places.

affiliations.name: Underworld
affiliations.description: Power drawn from death, decay, bones, ancestral thresholds, and lost souls.

affiliations.name: Fire
affiliations.description: Power drawn from flame, volcanoes, heat, rage, and transformation.

affiliations.name: Earth
affiliations.description: Power drawn from soil, roots, minerals, clay, and buried memory.

affiliations.name: Spirit
affiliations.description: Power drawn from raw spiritual force, unseen realms, and dreamlike presence.

affiliations.name: Trickster
affiliations.description: Power drawn from misdirection, jokes, illusions, games, and reversed paths.

affiliations.name: Beast
affiliations.description: Power drawn from instinct, claws, fangs, wild motion, and animal strength.

affiliations.name: Divine
affiliations.description: Power drawn from celestial authority, ancient vows, and rare heavenly favor.

affiliations.name: Corruption
affiliations.description: Power drawn from broken balance, spiritual infection, obsession, and despair.

affiliations.name: Moon
affiliations.description: Power drawn from moonlight, tides, dreams, sleep, mystery, and hidden truths.

affiliations.name: Sun
affiliations.description: Power drawn from daylight, growth, warmth, truth, and purification.

affiliations.name: Ancestor
affiliations.description: Power drawn from memory, lineage, old names, inherited duty, and family spirits.

affiliations.name: Storm
affiliations.description: Power drawn from typhoons, thunder, monsoon winds, and sudden change.

affiliations.name: Mist
affiliations.description: Power drawn from fog, mountain haze, vanishing paths, and uncertain borders.

affiliations.name: Blood
affiliations.description: Power drawn from life force, hunger, sacrifice, wounds, and cursed appetite.

affiliations.name: Dream
affiliations.description: Power drawn from sleep, visions, omens, nightmares, and prophecy.

affiliations.name: Metal
affiliations.description: Power drawn from blades, bells, chains, coins, gongs, and forged relics.

affiliations.name: Poison
affiliations.description: Power drawn from venom, rot, bitter herbs, insects, and toxic curses.

affiliations.name: Sound
affiliations.description: Power associated with voice, rhythm, echo, music, and sonic omens.

combat_classes.name: Guardian
combat_classes.description: A protector that shields allies and controls enemy attention.

combat_classes.name: Tank
combat_classes.description: A durable frontliner built to absorb punishment.

combat_classes.name: Warrior
combat_classes.description: A balanced physical fighter with reliable damage.

combat_classes.name: Berserker
combat_classes.description: A reckless attacker that trades safety for power.

combat_classes.name: Ranger
combat_classes.description: A precise ranged fighter that uses positioning and accuracy.

combat_classes.name: Assassin
combat_classes.description: A fast striker focused on critical hits and finishing weakened foes.

combat_classes.name: Mage
combat_classes.description: A spiritual damage dealer using curses, elements, or celestial force.

combat_classes.name: Shaman
combat_classes.description: A ritual caster that uses spirits, wards, and nature rites.

combat_classes.name: Healer
combat_classes.description: A recovery specialist that restores allies and removes conditions.

combat_classes.name: Support
combat_classes.description: A utility role focused on buffs, protection, and team advantage.

combat_classes.name: Controller
combat_classes.description: A battlefield manipulator that applies disables, slows, and forced movement.

combat_classes.name: Summoner
combat_classes.description: A caller of spirits, echoes, familiars, or temporary guardians.

combat_classes.name: Trickster
combat_classes.description: A disruptive role based on evasion, confusion, traps, and misdirection.

combat_classes.name: Warden
combat_classes.description: A territorial defender that grows stronger inside its favored habitat.

combat_classes.name: Oracle
combat_classes.description: A rare support-mage that reads omens and alters probability.

combat_classes.name: Legend
combat_classes.description: A mythic role reserved for exceptionally powerful Nilalang with story-defining influence.

nilalang_orders.name: Espiritu
nilalang_orders.description: Nature spirits and unseen beings tied to rivers, trees, wind, and sacred places.
nilalang_orders.gameplay_role: Maintain natural balance and guide worthy travelers.

nilalang_orders.name: Bantay
nilalang_orders.description: Guardians that protect places, relics, thresholds, forests, mountains, or communities.
nilalang_orders.gameplay_role: Defend territory and judge human intentions.

nilalang_orders.name: Hayop
nilalang_orders.description: Mythical beasts and spirit animals that embody instinct, omens, and wild power.
nilalang_orders.gameplay_role: Serve as wild companions, predators, messengers, and mounts.

nilalang_orders.name: Tao
nilalang_orders.description: Humans transformed by curse, ritual, hunger, grief, blessing, or forbidden knowledge.
nilalang_orders.gameplay_role: Represent human choices and moral consequences.

nilalang_orders.name: Kaluluwa
nilalang_orders.description: Ghosts, wandering souls, ancestral echoes, and remnants bound by memory.
nilalang_orders.gameplay_role: Preserve memory, haunt places, or seek resolution.

nilalang_orders.name: Diyos
nilalang_orders.description: Divine or near-divine entities of immense spiritual authority.
nilalang_orders.gameplay_role: Shape mythic events and rarely join ordinary parties.

nilalang_orders.name: Salinlahi
nilalang_orders.description: Lineage-bound beings tied to family duty, ancestral houses, or inherited vows.

nilalang_orders.name: Likha
nilalang_orders.description: Constructs, enchanted objects, living idols, and beings shaped by ritual craft.
nilalang_orders.gameplay_role: Guard shrines, relics, tools, and old agreements.

nilalang_orders.name: Legendary Being
nilalang_orders.description: Broad mythic beings whose stories carry exceptional cultural, cosmic, or regional weight.
nilalang_orders.gameplay_role: Anchor major quests, rare encounters, and mythic trials.

nilalang_orders.name: Folkloric Being
nilalang_orders.description: General folklore-rooted Nilalang used when a source does not fit a narrower order cleanly yet.
nilalang_orders.gameplay_role: Support broad codex entries until finer cultural or gameplay classification is needed.

personality_traits.name: Wise
personality_traits.description: Thinks before acting and values old lessons.

personality_traits.name: Protective
personality_traits.description: Defends allies, territory, and vulnerable beings.

personality_traits.name: Territorial
personality_traits.description: Challenges intruders but may respect proper offerings.

personality_traits.name: Mischievous
personality_traits.description: Enjoys jokes, riddles, tricks, and confusing travelers.

personality_traits.name: Curious
personality_traits.description: Approaches unfamiliar people, objects, and rituals.

personality_traits.name: Proud
personality_traits.description: Values honor, respect, and recognition.

personality_traits.name: Patient
personality_traits.description: Waits, watches, and acts only when the moment is right.

personality_traits.name: Vengeful
personality_traits.description: Remembers offenses and responds harshly to disrespect.

personality_traits.name: Compassionate
personality_traits.description: Helps the weak and responds well to mercy.

personality_traits.name: Stoic
personality_traits.description: Rarely shows emotion and resists intimidation.

personality_traits.name: Playful
personality_traits.description: Treats conflict like a game unless seriously threatened.

personality_traits.name: Cunning
personality_traits.description: Uses traps, feints, and indirect plans.

personality_traits.name: Loyal
personality_traits.description: Bonds deeply once trust is earned.

personality_traits.name: Timid
personality_traits.description: Avoids conflict and prefers hiding or fleeing.

personality_traits.name: Aggressive
personality_traits.description: Attacks quickly when threatened.

personality_traits.name: Noble
personality_traits.description: Acts according to duty and personal code.

personality_traits.name: Melancholic
personality_traits.description: Carries sorrow, longing, or old grief.

personality_traits.name: Greedy
personality_traits.description: Desires offerings, treasure, food, or attention.

personality_traits.name: Judgmental
personality_traits.description: Tests the character of humans before cooperating.

personality_traits.name: Restless
personality_traits.description: Moves constantly and dislikes being confined.

personality_traits.name: Secretive
personality_traits.description: Conceals motives, names, and true forms.

personality_traits.name: Honorable
personality_traits.description: Accepts fair duels and honest apologies.

personality_traits.name: Maternal
personality_traits.description: Protects children, nests, young spirits, or villages.

personality_traits.name: Scholarly
personality_traits.description: Values knowledge, stories, and old records.

personality_traits.name: Haunting
personality_traits.description: Speaks through signs, echoes, dreams, and omens.

personality_traits.name: Devout
personality_traits.description: Responds strongly to vows, rituals, and sacred promises.

personality_traits.name: Chaotic
personality_traits.description: Acts unpredictably and disrupts stable plans.

personality_traits.name: Merciful
personality_traits.description: Prefers cleansing corruption over destroying enemies.

personality_traits.name: Suspicious
personality_traits.description: Requires proof before trusting humans.

personality_traits.name: Joyful
personality_traits.description: Brightens nearby allies and resists despair.

personality_traits.name: Somber
personality_traits.description: Carries dignity, silence, and awareness of death.

personality_traits.name: Feral
personality_traits.description: Driven by instinct more than speech.

personality_traits.name: Teacherly
personality_traits.description: Guides younger beings through tests and stories.

personality_traits.name: Wandering
personality_traits.description: Rarely stays in one place for long.

personality_traits.name: Ritualistic
personality_traits.description: Acts according to precise rites and taboos.

personality_traits.name: Bold
personality_traits.description: Takes risks and pushes forward.

personality_traits.name: Gentle
personality_traits.description: Uses power carefully to avoid unnecessary harm.

personality_traits.name: Grieving
personality_traits.description: Bound to loss and unfinished farewell.

personality_traits.name: Mocking
personality_traits.description: Taunts enemies to provoke mistakes.

personality_traits.name: Dutiful
personality_traits.description: Prioritizes assigned purpose above personal desire.

personality_traits.name: Ancient
personality_traits.description: Old, patient, and shaped by long memory.

personality_traits.name: Easily Embarrassed
personality_traits.description: Quickly flustered when praised, exposed, or teased.

personality_traits.name: Fearful
personality_traits.description: Cautious and easily startled until trust is established.

personality_traits.name: Helpful
personality_traits.description: Inclined to assist allies, travelers, or communities in need.

personality_traits.name: Honorable when calmed
personality_traits.description: Acts with fairness once anger, fear, or corruption has been soothed.

personality_traits.name: Honorable when restored
personality_traits.description: Returns to principled behavior after healing or ritual restoration.

personality_traits.name: Loyal once defended
personality_traits.description: Forms strong loyalty after being protected from harm or judgment.

personality_traits.name: Loyal once soothed
personality_traits.description: Becomes faithful after fear, grief, or rage is gently calmed.

personality_traits.name: Protective once bonded
personality_traits.description: Defends companions fiercely after a trust bond is earned.

personality_traits.name: Reserved
personality_traits.description: Quiet, watchful, and slow to reveal intention.

personality_traits.name: Resolute
personality_traits.description: Steady, determined, and difficult to sway from a chosen duty.

personality_traits.name: Watchful
personality_traits.description: Alert and observant, often noticing danger before others.

ai_behaviors.name: Aggressive Striker
ai_behaviors.description: Prioritizes direct damage and weakened targets.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Attack first; use strongest available damage skill.

ai_behaviors.name: Defensive Guardian
ai_behaviors.description: Protects allies and uses guard skills often.

ai_behaviors.name: Supportive Healer
ai_behaviors.description: Keeps allies alive and removes negative effects.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Heal low HP allies; cleanse dangerous statuses.

ai_behaviors.name: Debuff Controller
ai_behaviors.description: Weakens enemies through slow, fear, blind, and curse.

ai_behaviors.name: Ambush Predator
ai_behaviors.description: Waits for openings, then bursts down vulnerable targets.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Hide, mark target, strike with high critical chance.

ai_behaviors.name: Pack Hunter
ai_behaviors.description: Coordinates attacks with allies of the same habitat.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Focus fire and gain bonuses near allies.

ai_behaviors.name: Territory Warden
ai_behaviors.description: Becomes stronger while defending a marked zone.

ai_behaviors.name: Ritual Caster
ai_behaviors.description: Uses setup turns to power major effects.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Build charge, then release strong magic.

ai_behaviors.name: Trickster Disruptor
ai_behaviors.description: Uses confusion, swapping, evasion, and random effects.

ai_behaviors.name: Summon Caller
ai_behaviors.description: Calls spirits, echoes, insects, or minions.

ai_behaviors.name: Boss Phase Shifter
ai_behaviors.description: Changes tactics when HP thresholds are crossed.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Use phase scripts at 75%, 50%, and 25% HP.

ai_behaviors.name: Cowardly Evader
ai_behaviors.description: Avoids damage and may flee when low on HP.

ai_behaviors.name: Counter Fighter
ai_behaviors.description: Lets enemies attack first, then retaliates.

ai_behaviors.name: Berserk Finisher
ai_behaviors.description: Grows more dangerous at low HP.

ai_behaviors.name: Cleansing Spirit
ai_behaviors.description: Targets corrupted foes and protects sacred allies.

ai_behaviors.name: Weather Caller
ai_behaviors.description: Changes the battlefield weather to gain advantage.

ai_behaviors.name: Omen Reader
ai_behaviors.description: Alters luck, crits, accuracy, and turn priority.

ai_behaviors.name: Poison Harrier
ai_behaviors.description: Applies poison and survives while damage over time works.

ai_behaviors.name: Life Drainer
ai_behaviors.description: Damages enemies while restoring itself.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Use drain skills when below 70% HP.

ai_behaviors.name: Shield Breaker
ai_behaviors.description: Targets tanks and removes barriers.

ai_behaviors.name: Field Manipulator
ai_behaviors.description: Creates terrain hazards and forced movement.

ai_behaviors.name: Ally Buffer
ai_behaviors.description: Increases team attack, speed, defense, or faith.

ai_behaviors.name: Duelist
ai_behaviors.description: Focuses on one enemy and avoids area attacks.

ai_behaviors.name: Relic Protector
ai_behaviors.description: Prioritizes defending objectives or shrines.

ai_behaviors.name: Night Stalker
ai_behaviors.description: Strongest at night and uses fear or stealth.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Use stealth and fear during night.

ai_behaviors.name: Day Sentinel
ai_behaviors.description: Strongest in daylight and uses reveal/cleanse skills.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Reveal hidden enemies and cleanse allies.

ai_behaviors.name: River Flow
ai_behaviors.description: Alternates healing, evasion, and sudden strikes.
ai_behaviors.behavior_rule: Heal over time and exploit speed.

ai_behaviors.name: Sea Tide
ai_behaviors.description: Builds momentum over multiple turns.

ai_behaviors.name: Mountain Wall
ai_behaviors.description: Slow, immovable, and very defensive.

ai_behaviors.name: Forest Snare
ai_behaviors.description: Controls movement using roots and terrain.

temperaments.name: Friendly
temperaments.description: Approaches peacefully and may offer help.

temperaments.name: Hostile
temperaments.description: Attacks on sight due to hunger, rage, or duty.

temperaments.name: Corrupted
temperaments.description: Distorted by imbalance and cannot be reasoned with until weakened.

temperaments.name: Divine
temperaments.description: Acts according to a sacred trial or higher purpose.

temperaments.name: Fearful
temperaments.description: Avoids contact and may flee immediately.

temperaments.name: Mischievous
temperaments.description: Tests the player through tricks instead of direct combat.

temperaments.name: Grieving
temperaments.description: Responds to memory, offerings, or unresolved tragedy.

status_effects.name: Bleed
status_effects.description: Loses HP at the end of each turn from open wounds.

status_effects.name: Burn
status_effects.description: Loses HP each turn and suffers reduced physical attack.

status_effects.name: Poison
status_effects.description: Loses increasing HP each turn from venom or rot.

status_effects.name: Sleep
status_effects.description: Cannot act until damaged or duration ends.

status_effects.name: Fear
status_effects.description: May skip actions and receives reduced accuracy.

status_effects.name: Confusion
status_effects.description: May target allies or random enemies.

status_effects.name: Blind
status_effects.description: Accuracy is greatly reduced.

status_effects.name: Silence
status_effects.description: Cannot use magic, chants, or ritual skills.

status_effects.name: Stun
status_effects.description: Cannot act for one turn.

status_effects.name: Root
status_effects.description: Cannot move or dodge effectively.

status_effects.name: Slow
status_effects.description: Speed and turn priority are reduced.

status_effects.name: Haste
status_effects.description: Speed and turn priority are increased.

status_effects.name: Blessed
status_effects.description: Faith and spirit defense are increased.

status_effects.name: Shielded
status_effects.description: Incoming damage is reduced.

status_effects.name: Regeneration
status_effects.description: Restores HP at the end of each turn.

status_effects.name: Purified
status_effects.description: Recently cleansed from corruption; resists curses.

status_effects.name: Cursed
status_effects.description: Luck, faith, and healing received are reduced.

status_effects.name: Doom
status_effects.description: A delayed burst of spiritual damage triggers later.

status_effects.name: Charm
status_effects.description: May refuse to attack the source of the effect.

status_effects.name: Petrify
status_effects.description: Cannot act and takes reduced damage.

status_effects.name: Spirit Leak
status_effects.description: Loses mana or spirit energy each turn.

status_effects.name: Mana Burn
status_effects.description: Takes damage when spending magic resources.

status_effects.name: Taunted
status_effects.description: Forced to target the taunter if possible.

status_effects.name: Marked
status_effects.description: Receives increased critical hit chance from attackers.

status_effects.name: Hidden
status_effects.description: Cannot be targeted by single-target attacks until revealed.

status_effects.name: Revealed
status_effects.description: Hidden and illusion effects are removed.

status_effects.name: Reflect
status_effects.description: Returns a portion of incoming damage.

status_effects.name: Counter Ready
status_effects.description: Retaliates after being hit by a direct attack.

status_effects.name: Weakened
status_effects.description: Attack and magic are reduced.

status_effects.name: Fortified
status_effects.description: Defense and spirit defense are increased.

status_effects.name: Exhausted
status_effects.description: Cannot use high-cost skills.

status_effects.name: Frenzy
status_effects.description: Attack increases but defense decreases.

status_effects.name: Calmed
status_effects.description: Frenzy, fear, and confusion are removed.

status_effects.name: Soaked
status_effects.description: Fire resistance increases but storm damage received increases.

status_effects.name: Electrified
status_effects.description: May be stunned when hit by water or metal skills.

status_effects.name: Frozen
status_effects.description: Cannot move; fire damage breaks the effect.

status_effects.name: Rot
status_effects.description: Healing received is reduced and poison damage increases.

status_effects.name: Hopeful
status_effects.description: Resists fear, doom, and despair effects.

status_effects.name: Despair
status_effects.description: Faith is reduced and doom effects become stronger.

status_effects.name: Ancestral Guard
status_effects.description: A protective spirit absorbs one harmful effect.

status_effects.name: Reveal
status_effects.description: Exposes hidden targets, illusions, weaknesses, or concealed battlefield information.

trust_methods.name: Complete Personal Quest
trust_methods.description: Earn trust by resolving the Nilalang's personal conflict.
trust_methods.example_use_case: Kapre joins after illegal loggers are driven away.

trust_methods.name: Restore Shrine
trust_methods.description: Repair or cleanse a damaged sanctuary.
trust_methods.example_use_case: Diwata appears after her flower shrine is restored.

trust_methods.name: Return Sacred Relic
trust_methods.description: Recover a stolen or lost spiritual object.
trust_methods.example_use_case: A river spirit trusts the player after a pearl is returned.

trust_methods.name: Heal Corruption
trust_methods.description: Weaken then cleanse corruption from the Nilalang.
trust_methods.example_use_case: A corrupted guardian becomes recruitable after purification.

trust_methods.name: Give Offering
trust_methods.description: Present food, craft, prayer, or respectful tribute.
trust_methods.example_use_case: Kapre accepts tobacco offered beneath a balete tree.

trust_methods.name: Defeat Honorably
trust_methods.description: Win a fair battle under agreed conditions.
trust_methods.example_use_case: A warrior spirit joins after a duel without items.

trust_methods.name: Solve Ancestral Riddle
trust_methods.description: Answer a riddle rooted in memory or local history.
trust_methods.example_use_case: Tikbalang respects the player after a trail puzzle.

trust_methods.name: Protect Habitat
trust_methods.description: Defend the Nilalang's home from harm.
trust_methods.example_use_case: Forest beings trust the player after replanting trees.

trust_methods.name: Help Related NPC
trust_methods.description: Assist a human connected to the Nilalang's story.
trust_methods.example_use_case: A ghost calms after their descendant is helped.

trust_methods.name: Complete Ritual Condition
trust_methods.description: Perform a ritual at the right time, place, and weather.
trust_methods.example_use_case: A moon spirit appears only during full moon rain.

trust_methods.name: Recover True Name
trust_methods.description: Learn and speak a forgotten name with respect.
trust_methods.example_use_case: An ancestral spirit joins after its name is remembered.

trust_methods.name: Break a Curse
trust_methods.description: Remove a curse binding the Nilalang to hostility.
trust_methods.example_use_case: A cursed human-form Nilalang becomes free.

trust_methods.name: Win Festival Trial
trust_methods.example_use_case: A trickster joins after the player wins a masked dance trial.

trust_methods.name: Offer Protection Vow
trust_methods.description: Promise to defend a place, family, or relic.
trust_methods.example_use_case: A guardian joins after a vow is made at a sanctuary.

trust_methods.name: Share a Story
trust_methods.description: Listen to and preserve the Nilalang's tale.
trust_methods.example_use_case: A Kaluluwa becomes peaceful after its story is recorded.

habitats.name: Balete Grove
habitats.description: Ancient tree groves where the Spirit Realm overlaps with the mortal world.

habitats.name: Bamboo Thicket
habitats.description: Dense bamboo paths used by spirits, hunters, and tricksters.

habitats.name: Rice Terraces
habitats.description: Highland farming landscapes shaped by human care and ancestral memory.

habitats.name: Mountain Peak
habitats.description: Windy peaks where sky and mountain spirits gather.

habitats.name: Limestone Cave
habitats.description: Dark cave systems holding echoes, bats, relics, and old bones.

habitats.name: Riverbank
habitats.description: Freshwater edges where healers, fishers, and river spirits meet.

habitats.name: Waterfall Sanctuary
habitats.description: Hidden waterfall pools considered sacred thresholds.

habitats.name: Mangrove Marsh
habitats.description: Coastal wetlands rich in roots, mud, birds, and hidden guardians.

habitats.name: Coral Reef
habitats.description: Bright underwater ecosystems protected by sea beings.

habitats.name: Open Sea
habitats.description: Deep ocean paths tied to tides, storms, and serpents.

habitats.name: Volcano Slope
habitats.description: Ashy terrain shaped by fire, minerals, and danger.

habitats.name: Old Chapel Ruins
habitats.description: Ruined sacred buildings where memory and spirits remain.

habitats.name: Spanish-Era Road
habitats.description: Old stone roads haunted by travelers, soldiers, and stories.

habitats.name: Ancestral House
habitats.description: Old family homes filled with heirlooms and restless memories.

habitats.name: Graveyard
habitats.description: Burial grounds where Kaluluwa and guardian spirits linger.

habitats.name: Market Town
habitats.description: Busy settlements where tricksters, humans, and small spirits mingle.

habitats.name: Fishing Village
habitats.description: Coastal communities tied to boats, nets, storms, and offerings.

habitats.name: Highland Village
habitats.description: Mountain communities close to rice terraces and ancestral guardians.

habitats.name: Hidden Lake
habitats.description: Quiet inland waters connected to dreams and old promises.

habitats.name: Spirit Threshold
habitats.description: A liminal zone where realms visibly overlap.

habitats.name: Abandoned Watchtower
habitats.description: Coastal or hilltop ruins used by sentinels and ghosts.

habitats.name: Moonlit Clearing
habitats.description: Open forest spaces where moon and dream beings appear.

habitats.name: Storm Coast
habitats.description: Rocky shorelines battered by monsoon winds and thunder.

habitats.name: Sacred Shrine
habitats.description: A maintained place of offering, memory, and ritual agreement.

habitats.name: Corrupted Wilds
habitats.description: Areas where imbalance has twisted plants, animals, and spirits.

habitats.name: Foggy Road
habitats.description: Mist-covered paths where travelers lose direction and omen-bearing Nilalang appear.

habitats.name: Market Town outskirts
habitats.description: Edges of busy settlements where rumor, trade, and hidden beings overlap.

habitats.name: Sacred Sites
habitats.description: Shrines, ritual grounds, ancestral stones, and protected places of offering.

habitats.name: Sacred wilderness
habitats.description: Untamed holy groves, ridges, rivers, and wild places guarded by old covenants.

weather_types.name: Clear
weather_types.description: Bright and stable weather with normal visibility.

weather_types.name: Rain
weather_types.description: Steady rain that strengthens river, forest, and water skills.

weather_types.name: Heavy Rain
weather_types.description: Strong rainfall that reduces fire effects and increases water hazards.

weather_types.name: Thunderstorm
weather_types.description: Lightning and wind increase storm and sky effects.

weather_types.name: Typhoon
weather_types.description: Extreme storm conditions with dangerous winds and sea power.

weather_types.name: Fog
weather_types.description: Low visibility that strengthens mist, dream, and trickster effects.

weather_types.name: Mist
weather_types.description: Gentle haze often found near mountains and waterfalls.

weather_types.name: Moonlit
weather_types.description: Night weather with strong lunar visibility.

weather_types.name: Eclipse
weather_types.description: Rare celestial event that empowers shadow, moon, and legendary beings.

weather_types.name: Drought
weather_types.description: Dry weather that strengthens fire but weakens river effects.

weather_types.name: Ashfall
weather_types.description: Volcanic ash reduces visibility and empowers fire/earth beings.

weather_types.name: Sea Breeze
weather_types.description: Calm coastal wind that supports sea and sky beings.

weather_types.name: Heat Haze
weather_types.description: Distorted hot air that improves illusion and fire effects.

weather_types.name: Spirit Glow
weather_types.description: Supernatural weather where unseen energy becomes visible.

weather_types.name: Dawn
weather_types.description: The first light of day, associated with renewal, omens, and transitional encounters.

weather_types.name: New Moon
weather_types.description: A moonless night that strengthens secrecy, spirits, curses, and hidden paths.

active_times.name: Midnight
active_times.description: Appears around the deepest part of night.

active_times.name: Full Moon
active_times.description: Appears only or more often during a full moon.

active_times.name: Storm Only
active_times.description: Appears only during thunderstorms or typhoons.

active_times.name: Festival Only
active_times.description: Appears during local events, rituals, or story festivals.

active_times.name: Story Triggered
active_times.description: Appears only when unlocked by story progress.

active_times.name: Eclipse
active_times.description: Rare eclipse-aligned activity windows tied to omen, shadow, and celestial disruption.

rarity_tiers.name: Common
rarity_tiers.description: Frequently encountered and suitable for early progression.

rarity_tiers.name: Uncommon
rarity_tiers.description: Less frequent but not especially rare.

rarity_tiers.name: Rare
rarity_tiers.description: Requires specific routes, conditions, or quests.

rarity_tiers.name: Epic
rarity_tiers.description: Powerful and usually connected to major side quests.

rarity_tiers.name: Legendary
rarity_tiers.description: Unique or nearly unique beings tied to major myths.

rarity_tiers.name: Mythic
rarity_tiers.description: Extremely powerful beings with world-level importance.

rarity_tiers.name: Ancient
rarity_tiers.description: Story-only or endgame beings not normally recruitable.

growth_ranks.name: D
growth_ranks.description: Newly bonded rank with limited trust and basic skills.

growth_ranks.name: C
growth_ranks.description: Stable companion rank with improved reliability.

growth_ranks.name: B
growth_ranks.description: Trusted rank with stronger stats and new animations.

growth_ranks.name: A
growth_ranks.description: High-bond rank with advanced skill access.

growth_ranks.name: S
growth_ranks.description: Elite rank showing visible aura growth.

growth_ranks.name: SS
growth_ranks.description: Master rank with refined form and strong passive scaling.

growth_ranks.name: SSS
growth_ranks.description: Legendary bond rank reached only through major trials.

equipment_categories.name: Anting-Anting
equipment_categories.description: Protective amulets that increase faith, luck, or resistance.

equipment_categories.name: Agimat
equipment_categories.description: Empowered charms used to enhance specific combat traits.

equipment_categories.name: Relic Weapon
equipment_categories.description: Sacred or historical weapons used by warrior-type Nilalang.

equipment_categories.name: Spirit Mask
equipment_categories.description: Masks that alter presence, fear, trickery, or spirit defense.

equipment_categories.name: Woven Garb
equipment_categories.description: Cloth, sashes, and garments carrying cultural or ritual meaning.

equipment_categories.name: Totem
equipment_categories.description: Carved or shaped objects that bind memory, land, or animal spirits.

equipment_categories.name: Bell
equipment_categories.description: Metal sound tools used for warding, calling, or ritual timing.

equipment_categories.name: Beadwork
equipment_categories.description: Ornamental beads that focus ancestral, sea, or mountain energy.

equipment_categories.name: Herbal Bundle
equipment_categories.description: Medicinal and ritual plant bundles for healing or cleansing.

equipment_categories.name: Shell Charm
equipment_categories.description: Sea-born accessories connected to tides, protection, and trade routes.

equipment_categories.name: Bone Talisman
equipment_categories.description: Somber charms connected to underworld and ancestral effects.

equipment_categories.name: Tattoo Mark
equipment_categories.description: Symbolic battle markings that function as spiritual equipment.

equipment_categories.name: Headdress
equipment_categories.description: Ceremonial headgear improving presence, faith, or command.

equipment_categories.name: Pipe Relic
equipment_categories.description: Smoking or breath-channeling relics used by forest giants and elders.

equipment_categories.name: Instrument
equipment_categories.description: Drums, flutes, gongs, or strings used to invoke sound skills.

item_categories.name: Offering
item_categories.description: Items given to earn trust or perform rituals.

item_categories.name: Consumable
item_categories.description: Single-use items for healing, cleansing, or buffs.

item_categories.name: Crafting Material
item_categories.description: Resources used to craft equipment or quest items.

item_categories.name: Quest Item
item_categories.description: Important objects tied to story or side quests.

item_categories.name: Food
item_categories.description: Meals, fruits, fish, sweets, and local dishes used for bonding.

item_categories.name: Herb
item_categories.description: Plants used for medicine, poison, ritual, or crafting.

item_categories.name: Relic
item_categories.description: Rare artifacts with historical or spiritual importance.

item_categories.name: Key Item
item_categories.description: Permanent progression item that unlocks areas or systems.

item_categories.name: Currency
item_categories.description: Trade objects such as coins, shells, beads, or spirit tokens.

item_categories.name: Fishing Item
item_categories.description: Bait, nets, hooks, and aquatic resources.

item_categories.name: Mining Item
item_categories.description: Ore, stones, crystals, and volcanic materials.

item_categories.name: Bug Item
item_categories.description: Insects, wings, venom sacs, and small spirit creatures.

item_categories.name: Memory Item
item_categories.description: Letters, names, heirlooms, and echo fragments.

item_categories.name: Purification Item
item_categories.description: Items used to cleanse corruption or curses.

item_categories.name: Festival Item
item_categories.description: Seasonal objects tied to celebrations and local events.

skill_categories.name: Physical
skill_categories.description: Direct body, claw, weapon, or impact techniques.

skill_categories.name: Magic
skill_categories.description: Spiritual, elemental, curse, or ritual damage skills.

skill_categories.name: Healing
skill_categories.description: Skills that restore HP or revive stability.

skill_categories.name: Buff
skill_categories.description: Skills that improve ally stats or protection.

skill_categories.name: Status
skill_categories.description: Skills primarily designed to apply conditions.

skill_categories.name: Summon
skill_categories.description: Skills that call spirits, minions, echoes, or temporary allies.

skill_categories.name: Ultimate
skill_categories.description: Powerful signature techniques with major cooldowns.

skill_categories.name: Field
skill_categories.description: Skills that alter terrain, weather, or battle zones.

skill_categories.name: Trust
skill_categories.description: Non-combat skills used in bonding, rituals, or dialogue.

damage_types.name: Physical
damage_types.description: Damage based mainly on attack and defense.

damage_types.name: Spiritual
damage_types.description: Damage based on magic, faith, and spirit defense.

damage_types.name: True
damage_types.description: Damage that ignores most defenses.

damage_types.name: Fire
damage_types.description: Heat, flame, ash, and volcanic damage.

damage_types.name: Water
damage_types.description: Freshwater, sea, rain, and pressure damage.

damage_types.name: Storm
damage_types.description: Lightning, thunder, wind, and typhoon damage.

damage_types.name: Earth
damage_types.description: Stone, soil, root, and mineral damage.

damage_types.name: Nature
damage_types.description: Vine, thorn, leaf, pollen, and wildlife damage.

damage_types.name: Shadow
damage_types.description: Night, fear, curse, and darkness damage.

damage_types.name: Sacred
damage_types.description: Blessing, purification, and sanctuary damage.

damage_types.name: Poison
damage_types.description: Venom, rot, toxin, and bitter herb damage.

damage_types.name: Blood
damage_types.description: Life-force, wound, sacrifice, and hunger damage.

damage_types.name: Sound
damage_types.description: Voice, gong, bell, echo, and song damage.

damage_types.name: Dream
damage_types.description: Sleep, nightmare, vision, and illusion damage.

damage_types.name: Ancestral
damage_types.description: Memory, lineage, vow, and old-name damage.

damage_types.name: Ancestor
damage_types.description: Ancestral force, inherited vows, and memory-bound spiritual impact.

damage_types.name: Beast
damage_types.description: Physical ferocity, fangs, claws, and animalistic force.

damage_types.name: Corruption
damage_types.description: Twisted spiritual force caused by curses, decay, and broken covenants.

damage_types.name: Forest
damage_types.description: Woodland, root, thorn, leaf, and grove-based force.

damage_types.name: Mountain
damage_types.description: Stone, cliff, quake, pressure, and highland force.

damage_types.name: River
damage_types.description: Flowing water, current, flood, and river-spirit force.

damage_types.name: Sea
damage_types.description: Saltwater, tide, depth, reef, and oceanic force.

damage_types.name: Sky
damage_types.description: Wind, storm, altitude, omen-bird, and celestial air force.

damage_types.name: Spirit
damage_types.description: Unseen spiritual force that affects souls, wards, and sacred presence.

damage_types.name: Trickster
damage_types.description: Misdirection, confusion, riddle, and luck-twisting force.

damage_types.name: Underworld
damage_types.description: Chthonic, grave-bound, abyssal, and death-adjacent force.
